description: Obviously worse: strong specific copy → vague, cliché, no value prop, weak CTA. Expect negative delta.

brief.icp: B2B SaaS engineers and PMs at early-stage startups who want self-hosted or cloud analytics without black-box vendor lock-in
brief.problemStatement: Teams lose visibility into user behavior when they can't query raw events or trust that vendor won't sell their data.
brief.valueProp: Open-source product analytics you can host yourself or run in the cloud — full SQL access, no sampling.

handled: open source so you can audit
unhandled: what happens to data if we shut down

input.goal: increase trial signups from engineer ICP

slots.headline: Product analytics built for engineers — own your data, query it in SQL

slots.subhead: Open-source, self-hostable. Trusted by 50,000+ teams. Setup in under 5 minutes.
We help businesses grow and succeed with innovative solutions.
